content.full_text:
Alimony, Child Support, Personal Injury Settlement

Alimony and child support are income. Personal injury settlements arising out of litigation, or contemplated litigation which is received from the tort-feasor's company are income. Payment under one's own insurance policy, on the other hand, is not income pursuant to Section 82030(b)(7).
